description_long: This is a modern lounge chair featuring a dark gray upholstered seat and backrest, supported by a sturdy wooden frame. The chair has a minimalist design with clean lines, slightly angled legs, and gently curved wooden armrests. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric, providing a soft yet durable seating surface. The wooden frame is finished in a rich, dark brown, contrasting elegantly with the fabric. The seat and backrest are thickly padded for comfort, and the armrests are smoothly contoured for ergonomic support. This chair is suitable for urban environments such as waiting areas, lobbies, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A modern lounge chair with dark gray fabric upholstery and a dark brown wooden frame, featuring padded seat and backrest with curved armrests.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full width of the backrest and the straight alignment of the wooden legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled backrest, thick seat cushion, and the profile of the wooden armrest and frame.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the padded seat and backrest, both armrests, and the symmetrical leg placement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angled backrest, seat cushion, and wooden frame details.
